question:
Impuses are not fruity. Impuses are wumpuses. Each wumpus is not temperate. Wumpuses are dumpuses. Rompuses are not sweet. Dumpuses are kind. Dumpuses are zumpuses. Zumpuses are wooden. Zumpuses are vumpuses. Every vumpus is large. Vumpuses are yumpuses. Yumpuses are transparent. Yumpuses are numpuses. Numpuses are brown. Numpuses are tumpuses. Tumpuses are sweet. Tumpuses are jompuses. Wren is a zumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Wren is sweet.
